151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from wool, and then he would not enter ihram."
151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dari wol, dan kemudian beliau tidak berihram."

152.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ did not fast during the first ten days of Dhul Hijjah.
152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak berpuasa selama sepuluh hari pertama bulan Dzulhijjah.

153.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say frequently in his bowing and prostration: "Glory be to You, our Lord, and praise. O Allah, forgive me" — fulfilling what is in the Quran.
153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sering mengucapkan dalam ruku dan sujudnya: "Subhanakallahumma Rabbana wa bihamdika, Allahummaghfirli (Maha Suci Engkau, wahai Rabb kami, dan segala puji bagi-Mu. Ya Allah, ampunilah aku)" — memenuhi apa yang ada dalam Al-Quran.

154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I never saw the private parts of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tidak pernah melihat aurat Rasulullah ﷺ."

155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to go out to the Fajr prayer with water dripping from his head, and he would spend the day fasting.
155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa keluar untuk shalat Subuh dengan air menetes dari kepalanya, dan beliau menghabiskan hari dalam keadaan berpuasa.

156.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw clouds or wind, he would leave his work even if he was in prayer and say: "O Allah, I seek refuge in You from whatever evil it contains." If it cleared, he would praise Allah, and if it rained he would say: "O Allah, a beneficial downpour."
156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melihat awan atau angin, beliau meninggalkan kerjanya meskipun beliau sedang shalat dan berdoa: "Ya Allah, aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari keburukan apa pun yang ada di dalamnya." Jika itu berlalu, beliau memuji Allah, dan jika hujan turun beliau berkata: "Ya Allah, hujan yang bermanfaat."

157.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ permitted the use of ruqyah (healing recitation) for every venomous creature.
157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengizinkan penggunaan ruqyah (bacaan penyembuhan) untuk setiap makhluk berbisa.

158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about al-bit' (a drink made from honey), and he said: "Every intoxicating drink is forbidden."
158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang al-bit' (minuman yang terbuat dari madu), dan beliau bersabda: "Setiap minuman yang memabukkan adalah haram."

159.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to rest his head in her lap and recite the Quran while she was menstruating.
159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa meletakkan kepalanya di pangkuannya dan membaca Al-Quran sementara ia sedang haid.

160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he would send them. Nothing that is forbidden for a man from his household was forbidden to him until the people returned."
160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau mengirimkannya. Tidak ada yang diharamkan bagi beliau yang diharamkan bagi seorang laki-laki dari keluarganya hingga orang-orang kembali."

161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only stopped at al-Muhassab to make his departure easier, so it is not a Sunnah. Whoever wishes may stop there, and whoever does not wish need not stop."
161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ hanya singgah di al-Muhassab untuk memudahkan keberangkatannya, jadi itu bukan Sunnah. Siapapun yang mau boleh singgah di sana, dan siapapun yang tidak mau tidak perlu singgah."

162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the last verses of Surah al-Baqarah were revealed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited them to the people and thereby forbade trade in wine.
162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ayat-ayat terakhir Surah al-Baqarah diturunkan, Rasulullah ﷺ membacakannya kepada orang-orang dan dengan demikian mengharamkan perdagangan khamr.

163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he would send them, while he did not enter ihram."
163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau mengirimkannya, sementara beliau tidak berihram."

164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We set out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ thinking it would be only Hajj."
164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami berangkat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dengan mengira bahwa itu hanya haji."

165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Whenever the Prophet ﷺ was given a choice between two things, one of which was easier than the other, he always chose the easier."
165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Setiap kali Nabi ﷺ diberikan pilihan antara dua hal, salah satunya lebih mudah dari yang lain, beliau selalu memilih yang lebih mudah."

166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he would send them. Then he would remain with us, abstaining from nothing that an muhrim must abstain from."
166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau mengirimkannya. Kemudian beliau tetap bersama kami, tanpa menghindari apa pun yang harus dihindari oleh seorang muhrim."

167.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to garland sheep as sacrificial animals and send them, and nothing was forbidden to him.
167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengalungi domba sebagai hewan kurban dan mengirimkannya, dan tidak ada yang diharamkan baginya.

168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to bathe together with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel when we were both in a state of ritual impurity."
168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu wadah ketika kami berdua dalam keadaan junub."

169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he was in a state of ritual impurity and wanted to sleep or eat, would perform ablution.
169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika dalam keadaan junub dan ingin tidur atau makan, beliau berwudhu.

170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when charity was given to Barirah, the Prophet ﷺ said: "It is charity for her and a gift for us."
170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika sedekah diberikan kepada Barirah, Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Itu adalah sedekah baginya dan hadiah bagi kami."

171.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I could see the perfume glistening in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was in the state of ihram."
171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bisa melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram."

172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she menstruated during Hajj, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Leave your 'Umrah, undo your hair, comb it, and enter ihram for Hajj." She did so. On the night of al-Hasba, he sent her with 'Abd al-Rahman to al-Tan'im, and she entered ihram for 'Umrah in place of her missed 'Umrah. Thus Allah the Almighty fulfilled her Hajj and her 'Umrah with neither sacrifice, fasting, nor charity.
172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia haid selama haji, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tinggalkan umrahmu, urai rambutmu, sisir, dan berihramlah untuk haji." Ia melakukannya. Pada malam al-Hasba, beliau mengirimnya bersama Abdurrahman ke at-Tan'im, dan ia berihram untuk umrah sebagai pengganti umrahnya yang terlewat. Dengan demikian Allah Yang Maha Mulia menyempurnakan haji dan umrahnya tanpa kurban, puasa, maupun sedekah.

173.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she saw 'Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakr performing ablution, she said: "O 'Abd al-Rahman, perform the ablution properly, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Woe to the heels from the Fire.'"
173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia melihat Abdurrahman bin Abi Bakar berwudhu, ia berkata: "Wahai Abdurrahman, sempurnakanlah wudhu, karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit dari api neraka.'"

174.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to kiss while fasting. "And in the Messenger of Allah you have an excellent example."
174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mencium dalam keadaan berpuasa. "Dan pada diri Rasulullah terdapat suri teladan yang baik."

175.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The one who recites the Quran and is proficient in it will be with the noble and righteous scribes. And the one who recites the Quran and struggles with it will have two rewards."
175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Orang yang membaca Al-Quran dan mahir di dalamnya akan bersama para utusan yang mulia dan berbakti. Dan orang yang membaca Al-Quran dan susah payah akan mendapat dua pahala."

176.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked with what the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would begin when he entered the house. She said: "With the miswak."
176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya dengan apa Rasulullah ﷺ memulai ketika memasuki rumah. Ia berkata: "Dengan siwak."

177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to bathe together with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel while we were both in a state of ritual impurity."
177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu wadah sementara kami berdua dalam keadaan junub."

178.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I would drink while menstruating, then hand it to the Prophet ﷺ and he would place his mouth where mine had been. I would also gnaw on a bone and hand it to him, and he would place his mouth where mine had been."
178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku minum dalam keadaan haid, lalu memberikannya kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau meletakkan mulutnya di tempat mulutku berada. Aku juga menggigit tulang dan memberikannya kepada beliau, dan beliau meletakkan mulutnya di tempat mulutku berada."

179.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ did not perform ablution after bathing."
179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ tidak berwudhu setelah mandi."

180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Whoever tells you that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ urinated standing, do not believe him. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never urinated standing since the Quran was revealed to him."
180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ buang air kecil sambil berdiri, jangan percaya dia. Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah buang air kecil sambil berdiri sejak Al-Quran diturunkan kepada beliau."

181.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he wanted to sleep or eat while in a state of ritual impurity, would perform ablution.
181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika ingin tidur atau makan dalam keadaan junub, beliau berwudhu.

182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he wanted to eat while in a state of ritual impurity, would wash his hands.
182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika ingin makan dalam keadaan junub, beliau mencuci tangannya.

183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ used to pray at night while I was lying across between him and the qiblah. When he wanted to pray Witr, he would wake me and I would pray Witr."
183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat malam sementara aku berbaring melintang di antara beliau dan kiblat. Ketika beliau ingin shalat Witir, beliau membangunkanku dan aku shalat Witir."

184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss some of his wives while he was fasting."
184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium sebagian istrinya dalam keadaan berpuasa."

185.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ was shrouded in three white Yemeni garments, with neither a shirt nor a turban among them."
185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ dikafani dengan tiga helai kain kafan putih dari Yaman, tanpa kemeja maupun sorban di antara keduanya."

186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I applied perfume to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for both his ihram and his exiting of ihram — when he entered ihram, and when he exited ihram before performing the circumambulation of the House."
186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk ihramnya maupun ketika keluar dari ihram — ketika beliau masuk ihram, dan ketika beliau keluar dari ihram sebelum melakukan tawaf Baitullah."

187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when Safiyyah had her menses and someone said she would detain them, the Prophet ﷺ asked: "Had she not already performed the tawaf of ifadah?" When told yes, but she menstruated after it, he said: "Then there is no delay on your account," and he departed with her.
187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Shafiyyah haid dan seseorang berkata ia akan menahan mereka, Nabi ﷺ bertanya: "Bukankah ia sudah melakukan tawaf ifadah?" Ketika diberitahu ya, tetapi ia haid setelah itu, beliau bersabda: "Kalau begitu tidak ada penundaan atas namamu," dan beliau berangkat bersamanya.

188.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a man divorced his wife and she then married another man who divorced her before consummating the marriage, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked: "Is she lawful for the first?" He said: "No, not until he has tasted her sweetness as the first tasted it."
188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seorang laki-laki menceraikan istrinya dan ia kemudian menikah dengan laki-laki lain yang menceraikannya sebelum menggaulinya, Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya: "Apakah ia halal bagi yang pertama?" Beliau bersabda: "Tidak, hingga ia merasakan manisnya sebagaimana yang pertama merasakannya."

189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: "He is like the fringe of my garment." He said: "No, not until you have tasted his sweetness, or he has tasted your sweetness."
189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: "Dia seperti pinggiran pakaianku." Beliau bersabda: "Tidak, hingga kamu merasakan manisnya, atau ia merasakan manismu."

190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say in his bowing and prostration: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabb al-Mala'ikati wa al-Ruh (Perfect, Holy, Lord of the Angels and the Spirit)" — three times.
190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan dalam ruku dan sujudnya: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabbul Mala'ikati war Ruh (Maha Suci, Maha Kudus, Rabb para malaikat dan Ruh)" — tiga kali.

191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to observe continuous fasting and would fast even during travel." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "If you wish, fast; and if you wish, break your fast."
191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa berpuasa secara terus-menerus dan berpuasa bahkan ketika bepergian." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jika kamu mau, berpuasalah; dan jika kamu mau, berbukalah."

192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to bathe together with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel, scooping from it together with him."
192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu wadah, menciduk darinya bersama beliau."

193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ and I would bathe from a single vessel and I would say: 'Leave some for me, leave some for me.'"
193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ dan aku mandi dari satu wadah dan aku berkata: 'Sisakan untukku, sisakan untukku.'"

194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We would surely have prevented women from the mosque as the women of the Children of Israel were prevented."
194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami pasti akan melarang wanita dari masjid sebagaimana wanita-wanita Bani Isra'il dilarang."

195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "The best of what a man eats is from his own earnings, and his children are from his earnings."
195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Sebaik-baik apa yang dimakan seseorang adalah dari hasil usahanya sendiri, dan anak-anaknya adalah dari hasil usahanya."

196.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she saw semen on the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, she would scrape it off — or rub it off.
196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia melihat air mani di pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ, ia mengerokknya — atau menggosoknya.

197.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss while he was fasting.
197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium dalam keadaan berpuasa.

198.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: "I have two neighbors — to which one should I give a gift?" He said: "To the one whose door is closest to you."
198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: "Aku memiliki dua tetangga — kepada yang mana aku harus memberi hadiah?" Beliau bersabda: "Kepada yang pintunya paling dekat denganmu."

199.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) and Maymunah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding certain matters.
199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dan Maimunah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai hal-hal tertentu.

200.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to begin the prayer with takbir and the recitation of 'Praise be to Allah, Lord of the worlds.' When he bowed, he would neither raise his head nor lower it but keep it level. When he raised his head from bowing, he would not prostrate until he was standing upright. When he raised his head from prostration, he would not prostrate again until he was sitting fully upright.
200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memulai shalat dengan takbir dan bacaan 'Segala puji bagi Allah, Rabb semesta alam.' Ketika ruku, beliau tidak mengangkat kepalanya maupun menurunkannya tetapi menjaga agar sejajar. Ketika mengangkat kepalanya dari ruku, beliau tidak sujud hingga berdiri tegak. Ketika mengangkat kepalanya dari sujud, beliau tidak sujud lagi hingga duduk dengan sempurna.
